passport.label: Passport number
passport.help: Printed on the photo page of your passport. Usually starts with a letter.

errors.tooShort: Passport number too short — min 6 characters
errors.tooLong: Passport number too long — max 9 characters
errors.invalidChars: Letters and numbers only — no spaces or symbols
errors.invalidFormat: Most passports start with a letter. Double check yours.

given_name.label: Given name
given_name.help: Exactly as shown on your passport (Latin letters only)

errors.tooLong: Max 40 characters. Use the Latin abbreviation shown on your passport.
errors.invalidChars: Use the Latin spelling from your passport — no accents or special characters

family_name.label: Family name
family_name.help: Exactly as shown on your passport (Latin letters only)

errors.invalidChars: Use the Latin spelling from your passport — no accents or special characters

errors.tooEarly: Date of birth seems too far in the past — double check
errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be in the future

flight_number.label: Flight number
flight_number.help: Airline 2-letter code + flight number, no spaces (e.g. TG312, UA1234)

errors.invalidFormat: Format: airline code + number (e.g. TG312, UA1234). No spaces.

arrival_date.label: Arrival date
arrival_date.help: Format: YYYY-MM-DD — the date you land in Thailand

errors.tooEarly: TDAC must be filed within 3 days before arrival
errors.tooLate: Arrival date seems too far in the future

email.label: Email
email.help: Confirmation is sent here. Use an email you can check on your phone.
